Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: The rep's actual ability to help resolve or address the customer's need.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly states the rep helped them or got things done. Include: 'very helpful', 'he helped me', 'she assisted', 'helped me out', 'helped me a lot', 'so helpful', 'extremely helpful'. Distinguish from general praise (Overall Positive) by presence of help/assist language.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: The rep's actual ability to help resolve or address the customer's need.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states rep failed to help or was unable to assist. Include: 'no help at all', 'wasn't helpful', 'didn't help me', 'couldn't assist', 'wasn't of any help', 'no help', 'wasn't able to help'. Exclude rude behavior (see Attitude topic).

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How the rep presented themselves interpersonally — tone warmth courtesy and respect.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes rep as friendly, kind, warm, nice, pleasant, sweet, polite, courteous, wonderful, lovely, delightful. Include: 'very friendly', 'so kind', 'very polite', 'nice attitude', 'pleasant voice', 'she was sweet'. Separate from helpful (helpfulness sub-topic).

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How the rep presented themselves interpersonally — tone warmth courtesy and respect.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes rep as rude, disrespectful, nasty, arrogant, condescending, dismissive, or mean. Include: 'she was rude', 'nasty attitude', 'very rude', 'disrespectful', 'heartless', 'arrogant woman', 'condescending'. High CX risk signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How the rep presented themselves interpersonally — tone warmth courtesy and respect.
Sub_Topic: Rep Hung Up / Ended Call Prematurely
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states rep hung up on them or disconnected without resolution. Include: 'hung up on me', 'she hung up', 'they disconnected me', 'he ended the call', 'I got hung up on'. Distinct churn risk indicator. Exclude accidental drops.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How the rep presented themselves interpersonally — tone warmth courtesy and respect.
Sub_Topic: Rep Was Impersonal / Dismissive / Did Not Listen
Sub_Topic_Definition: Rep did not engage, felt robotic, dismissive, or refused to listen. Include: 'did not listen', 'wouldn't listen', 'didn't listen', 'too pushy', 'didn't care', 'impersonal', 'he didn't care about my problem'. Exclude general unhelpfulness.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: The rep's conduct composure work ethic and professional standards.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer uses professionalism language. Include: 'professional', 'very professional', 'professionalism', 'well spoken', 'composed', 'knowledgeable and professional', 'muy profesional'. High correlation with overall satisfaction.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: The rep's conduct composure work ethic and professional standards.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer calls out unprofessional behavior or perceived incompetence. Include: 'unprofessional', 'incompetent', 'total failure', 'doesn't know what they're doing', 'poor conduct', 'needs retraining'. Actionable for coaching.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How well the rep understood the product gave accurate information and demonstrated expertise.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates rep had strong product knowledge or gave accurate information. Include: 'knowledgeable', 'knew his stuff', 'very knowledgeable', 'knows the job', 'knew what they were doing', 'very informative', 'gave great info'. Track for training effectiveness.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How well the rep understood the product gave accurate information and demonstrated expertise.
Sub_Topic: Rep Lacked Knowledge / Gave Wrong Information
Sub_Topic_Definition: Rep gave incorrect information, seemed uninformed, or was confused. Include: 'wrong response', 'didn't know', 'poor knowledge', 'guessing at problem', 'gave wrong info', 'didn't have a clue', 'still learning', 'not trained'. Exclude intentional deception (see Dishonesty).

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How well the rep understood the product gave accurate information and demonstrated expertise.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer believes rep intentionally lied, misled, or deceived them. Include: 'being lied to', 'I was lied to', 'she lied', 'misleading', 'he was not truthful', 'I was misguided', 'felt deceived', 'lied in contract'. High severity — flag for investigation.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Whether the rep took adequate time listened carefully and was thorough in their approach.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly mentions patience. Include: 'very patient', 'he was patient', 'so patient', 'patient with me', 'took her time', 'took time to explain', 'patient person'. Strong satisfaction driver.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Whether the rep took adequate time listened carefully and was thorough in their approach.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Rep gave thorough explanation or was detail-oriented. Include: 'very thorough', 'explained everything', 'went through everything', 'detailed', 'thorough walkthrough'. Combine with knowledgeable for training signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Whether the rep took adequate time listened carefully and was thorough in their approach.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Rep rushed the customer or was impatient. Include: 'too fast', 'rushed me', 'didn't take time', 'felt hurried', 'was not patient'. Exclude dismissive/rude (separate sub-topic).

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How clearly the rep communicated — language clarity comprehension and ability to explain.
Sub_Topic: Rep Communicated Clearly / Easy to Understand
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer praised rep's communication clarity. Include: 'clear explanation', 'easy to understand', 'well explained', 'communicated well', 'clear and concise', 'easy to talk to', 'bueno y claro'. Track for bilingual/accent monitoring.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How clearly the rep communicated — language clarity comprehension and ability to explain.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer had difficulty understanding rep due to language or accent. Include: 'hard to understand', 'couldn't understand', 'language barrier', 'accent was strong', 'speak clear English', 'speak English', 'can't understand him'. Note: Do NOT use if customer is non-English themselves.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: How clearly the rep communicated — language clarity comprehension and ability to explain.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly requests domestic agents or English-speaking reps. Include: 'get some Americans', 'don't outsource', 'use local people', 'quit outsourcing', 'proper English', 'get correct answers'. Policy/ops signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses desire to formally recognize or retain a rep.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer recommends rep for raise or promotion. Include: 'give her a raise', 'give him a raise', 'give him a promotion', 'keep her', 'he's a keeper', 'she's a keeper', 'she's a superstar', 'she deserves a raise', 'promote her'. High satisfaction signal — retention opportunity.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses desire to formally recognize or retain a rep.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer names a specific rep positively but without raise/promotion language. Include: 'John was great', 'Maria was excellent', 'Sam was helpful'. Use for individual rep performance tracking. Flag name for supervisor.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Holistic satisfaction or dissatisfaction with the rep not attributed to a specific behavior.
Sub_Topic_Definition: General praise for the rep without a specific behavior anchor. Include: 'she was great', 'he was amazing', 'awesome rep', 'wonderful person', 'excellent employee', 'great service', 'she's awesome', 'he was fantastic'. Only use when no specific behavior sub-topic applies — prefer specific sub-topics.

Category_Definition: Feedback about staff performance behavior and interpersonal interactions with reps agents or technicians.
Topic_Definition: Holistic satisfaction or dissatisfaction with the rep not attributed to a specific behavior.
Sub_Topic_Definition: General negative about rep without specific behavior. Include: 'bad experience', 'total failure', 'horrible', 'waste of time', 'terrible rep', 'worst rep'. Prefer specific sub-topics when behavior is identifiable.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Whether the customer's issue or request was actually resolved.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer confirms issue was resolved. Include: 'issue resolved', 'problem solved', 'fixed', 'resolved my issue', 'got it done', 'resolved pronto', 'todo resuelto', 'si me resolvi', 'fixed the ticket'. Primary resolution metric.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Whether the customer's issue or request was actually resolved.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer confirms issue was not resolved or is still ongoing. Include: 'issue not fixed', 'not resolved', 'still not working', 'nothing resolved', 'still have a problem', 'never finished', 'still unresolved', 'problem not solved', 'still isn't resolved'. Direct CSAT driver.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Whether the customer's issue or request was actually resolved.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates some progress but issue not fully resolved. Include: 'still in progress', 'partially fixed', 'working on it', 'time will tell', 'waiting on results', 'not done yet', 'solved for now'. Track for recontact risk.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Time spent waiting on hold during transfer or for service to begin.
Sub_Topic: Wait Time Too Long / Long Hold
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains about wait time or time on hold. Include: 'long wait time', 'took too long', 'too long on hold', 'waited too long', 'long hold', 'takes too long', 'long waiting time', 'took an hour', 'wait time insulting'. Strong CSAT detractor.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Time spent waiting on hold during transfer or for service to begin.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer positively mentions speed. Include: 'fast and easy', 'quick service', 'quick response', 'no wait', 'prompt service', 'fast service', 'efficient', 'responded quickly', 'rapid'. Track as differentiator.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Time spent waiting on hold during transfer or for service to begin.
Sub_Topic: Request for Shorter Wait / More Staffing
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly requests shorter wait times or more reps. Include: 'need more reps', 'hire more people', 'shorter wait times', 'shorten hold time', 'answer your phones', 'need more employees'. Operations staffing signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: How easy or difficult the overall interaction experience felt — from reaching the rep to completing the task.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes interaction as easy, smooth, seamless, painless, or simple. Include: 'easy process', 'went smoothly', 'seamless', 'painless', 'no hassle', 'simple and easy', 'quick and easy', 'easy and quick'. Benchmark for process design.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: How easy or difficult the overall interaction experience felt — from reaching the rep to completing the task.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes the interaction as difficult, frustrating, complicated, stressful, or a waste of time. Include: 'frustrating', 'complicated', 'difficult process', 'stressful', 'waste of time', 'wasted my time', 'terrible process'. Separate from wait time.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: How easy or difficult the overall interaction experience felt — from reaching the rep to completing the task.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer was transferred multiple times or bounced between departments. Include: 'transferred too many times', 'kept being transferred', 'spoke to multiple people', 'bounced around', 'passed around'. Distinct process failure signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests or comments on follow-up callbacks or technician appointments.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests a callback. Include: 'please call me', 'call me back', 'need a call back', 'contact me now', 'give me a call', 'I need a call back', 'please respond back'. Unresolved need signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests or comments on follow-up callbacks or technician appointments.
Sub_Topic: Technician No-Show / Did Not Show Up
Sub_Topic_Definition: Technician did not show up for scheduled appointment. Include: 'never showed up', 'he didn't show up', 'he never came', 'no one showed up', 'did not show up', 'did he even show up'. Schedule/dispatch failure.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests or comments on follow-up callbacks or technician appointments.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports call was dropped or they were disconnected. Include: 'call was dropped', 'got disconnected', 'call dropped', 'we got disconnected', 'call was ignored'. Track for network/call center tech issues.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback specifically about automated systems IVR chatbots or AI assistants in the service journey.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer expresses frustration with AI, automated menus, bots, or IVR. Include: 'get rid of AI', 'AI is useless', 'hate the menu', 'your AI is useless', 'automated ****', 'do away with AI', 'need real people', 'humans please', 'speak to a human', 'AI is terrible', 'stop the AI app', 'less AI assistance', 'I hate electronics', 'automation stinks'. Strategic signal for AI investment.

Category_Definition: Feedback about operational and service delivery processes — how easy or difficult it was to get service resolving issues wait times and interaction flow.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback specifically about automated systems IVR chatbots or AI assistants in the service journey.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer positively mentions digital, chat, or self-service experience. Include: 'easy chat', 'nice easy chat', 'digital was easy', 'quick online', 'website was easy'. Track against AI investment.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: How customers feel about the overall level of their bill — too high or acceptable.
Sub_Topic: Bill Is Too High / Too Expensive
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states bill or prices are too high, too expensive, or wants to pay less. Include: 'too expensive', 'bill is too high', 'paying too much', 'prices are too high', 'my bill is high', 'very expensive', 'bill too high', 'muy caro el servicio'. Primary pricing dissatisfier.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: How customers feel about the overall level of their bill — too high or acceptable.
Sub_Topic: Request to Lower Bill / Reduce Costs
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly requests bill reduction or cheaper options. Include: 'lower my bill', 'lower my phone bill', 'reduce my bill', 'need lower prices', 'cheaper prices', 'lower the cost', 'lower your rates', 'try down my bill', 'need my bill lower'. Direct churn prevention signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: How customers feel about the overall level of their bill — too high or acceptable.
Sub_Topic: Pricing Positive / Good Value / Saved Money
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is positive about pricing or mentions saving money. Include: 'helped me save money', 'good deal', 'great value', 'love to save money', 'transparent prices'. Track as retention/acquisition signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Feedback specifically about bills going up or unexpected price increases.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports unexpected bill increase. Include: 'bill increase', 'prices went up', 'price increase', 'my bill went up', 'bill keeps going up', 'rate increase'. Track month-over-month for anomaly detection.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Feedback specifically about bills going up or unexpected price increases.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer uses strong language implying AT&T is exploitative. Include: 'corporate greed', 'money hungry', 'you charge too much', 'you're too expensive', 'are to expensive', 'yall money hungry'. Churn risk + brand reputation signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer reports incorrect charges unauthorized charges or billing discrepancies.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports being incorrectly charged or overcharged. Include: 'overcharged', 'wrong charge', 'billing error', 'att over charge me', 'billing issues', 'cobros k no acepte', 'incorrect bill'. Escalation flag.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer reports incorrect charges unauthorized charges or billing discrepancies.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is requesting a refund or account credit. Include: 'refund my money', 'give me a refund', 'credit my account', 'I want money back', 'refund 5 months', 'reimburse', 'I need my money back'. Revenue protection signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer reports incorrect charges unauthorized charges or billing discrepancies.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer believes they were scammed or defrauded. Include: 'I was scammed', 'this is a fraud', 'stole my money', 'you scammed us', 'son un fraude', 'THIS IS A FRAUD', 'you guys scammed me', 'ATT is always lying', 'att is full of liars'. Legal/compliance flag — high severity.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about promotions deals discounts or requests for better pricing.
Sub_Topic: Request for Discount / Better Deal / Promotion
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests a discount or better promotion. Include: 'better prices', 'lower your rates', 'get me a discount', 'cheaper phone bill', 'better promotions', 'offer more discounts', 'cheaper phone rates'. Track for win-back/retention opportunities.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about promotions deals discounts or requests for better pricing.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains specifically about TV/Uverse or bundled service pricing. Include: 'uverse is too high', 'cable bill', 'bundle too expensive'. Separate from general bill complaints for product-level tracking.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly links high cost to cancellation or switching intent.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states they are leaving or canceling specifically because of price. Include: 'going to Verizon because too expensive', 'leaving AT&T, too expensive', 'I'm canceling, bill too high', 'switching because cheaper elsewhere'. Churn risk + pricing signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about home internet or WiFi service performance speed or outages.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports internet or WiFi is completely down or not working. Include: 'still no WiFi', 'fix my internet', 'internet ****', 'WiFi still down', 'no internet', 'internet still down', 'still no service', 'FIX MY INTERNET', 'we never got WiFi', '18 days with no WiFi'. High-urgency service failure.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about home internet or WiFi service performance speed or outages.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports slow internet or poor WiFi speed. Include: 'internet is slow', 'slow internet', 'poor WiFi speed', 'faster WiFi speed', 'need faster internet', 'internet not great', 'poor internet'. Track for network investment signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about home internet or WiFi service performance speed or outages.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is satisfied with internet service. Include: 'great WiFi', 'love my internet', 'great wifi services', 'I like my internet', 'I love my internet'. Track retention signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about wireless phone service signal coverage dropped calls or mobile service failures.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports phone or wireless service failure. Include: 'fix my phone', 'still no phone', 'phone went dead', 'mala cobertura', 'landline still dead', 'tower was down', 'no service'. Separate from device issues.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about wireless phone service signal coverage dropped calls or mobile service failures.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer mentions a device, modem, router, or hardware problem. Include: 'need new modem', 'router issue', 'equipment problem', 'modem', 'my modem lite is off', 'need a new router', 'Wi-Fi keeps dropping'. Separate from service outage.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about wireless phone service signal coverage dropped calls or mobile service failures.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports poor signal or coverage problems. Include: 'poor coverage', 'bad signal', 'no signal', 'coverage issue', 'falta de la senal'. Geographic signal for network planning.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about fiber optic service availability infrastructure or new technology offerings.
Sub_Topic: Fiber Not Available / Request for Fiber
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests fiber or reports it is unavailable in their area. Include: 'cannot get fiber', 'need fiber in area', 'fiber optic internet', 'the new fiber', 'wish there was fiber'. Infrastructure investment signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about fiber optic service availability infrastructure or new technology offerings.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests upgrade or newer technology. Include: 'need faster speeds', '5G', 'to get 5G all of it', 'get better equipment'. Track for product roadmap.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the quality reliability or performance of AT&T's wireless broadband TV or other products and services.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about video or TV service.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports TV service problem. Include: 'need my TV fixed', 'TV problem', 'no we need a new TV'. Low volume but track for bundled service retention.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses intent to cancel service or switch to a competitor.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states they are leaving or have left AT&T without specifying reason. Include: 'cancel my account', 'I want to cancel', 'I'm leaving AT&T', 'im leaving att', 'I am dropping AT&T', 'I am cancelling ATT', 'I cancelled service'. Primary churn signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses intent to cancel service or switch to a competitor.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer names a specific competitor they are switching to. Include: 'going to Verizon', 'going to T-Mobile', 'changing carrier', 'switching my service', 'changing company', 'going to Verison', 'I'm going to T-Mobile'. Track by competitor for competitive intelligence.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about specific policies terms or business practices the customer finds unfair.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains about company policies, contracts, or terms. Include: 'your policies ****', 'lying in contract', 'honor your contract', 'your policies', 'bad policies', 'terms are unfair'. Tag for policy review.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about specific policies terms or business practices the customer finds unfair.
Sub_Topic: Late Fees / Auto-Pay / Payment Policy Complaint
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains about late fees auto-pay or payment policies. Include: 'I hate late fees', 'stop auto pay', 'payment issue', 'auto-pay problem'. Billing operations signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses loyalty to AT&T or appreciation for the brand.
Sub_Topic: AT&T Brand Loyalty / Positive Brand Sentiment
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer expresses loyalty or positive brand sentiment. Include: 'love AT&T', 'AT&T is the best', 'thankful for AT&T', 'I Love My AT&T', 'great to speak with', 'att always very good'. Retention and NPS signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Customer expresses loyalty to AT&T or appreciation for the brand.
Sub_Topic: AT&T Brand Negative / Dissatisfied with Company
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer expresses overall dissatisfaction or anger with AT&T as a company. Include: 'AT&T ****', 'worst company', 'I hate AT&T', 'ATT is horrible', 'don't like AT&T', 'att is terrible'. High churn risk signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about AT&T company policies contracts terms of service cancellation or business practices that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about AT&T's use of outsourced foreign or non-domestic support staff.
Sub_Topic: Request to Stop Outsourcing / Use Local Staff
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests local or American agents. Include: 'don't outsource', 'use local people', 'get some Americans', 'quit outsourcing', 'get correct answers', 'use local staff'. Workforce policy signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about digital channels technology tools or systems used to access or manage AT&T services — including the app website account portal or in-store systems.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about the AT&T mobile app or website usability or performance.
Sub_Topic: App / Website Not Working / Technical Issue
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports AT&T app or website is down, broken, or difficult to use. Include: 'app is not working', 'your website ****', 'website issue', 'app issue', 'your website is awful'. Track for digital channel health.

Category_Definition: Feedback about digital channels technology tools or systems used to access or manage AT&T services — including the app website account portal or in-store systems.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about the AT&T mobile app or website usability or performance.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer positively mentions app, website, or digital account management. Include: 'easy chat', 'website was easy', 'app is great', 'love the online portal'. Track digital adoption.

Category_Definition: Feedback about digital channels technology tools or systems used to access or manage AT&T services — including the app website account portal or in-store systems.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about accessing or managing their account digitally or in-store.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer cannot access or log into their account. Include: 'account set up', 'need to get email', 'need my WiFi account', 'voicemail locked', 'fix my voicemail', 'get my email'. Digital access failure signal.

Category_Definition: Feedback about digital channels technology tools or systems used to access or manage AT&T services — including the app website account portal or in-store systems.
Topic_Definition: Customer feedback about accessing or managing their account digitally or in-store.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer comments on the in-store or physical location experience. Include: 'love the store', 'clean store', 'good visit', 'great location'. Track for retail operations.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Customer declines to provide feedback or indicates they have nothing to share.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly declines to provide feedback. Include: 'no thank you', 'nothing else', 'not at this time', 'none at this time', 'nothing to share', 'no comment', 'nothing further', 'nothing right now', 'nope all good', 'nothing to add', 'nothing more', 'not applicable', 'nothing thank you', 'no nothing else'. Must contain no actionable sentiment. This will be the single highest-volume sub-topic.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Customer clarifies they selected the wrong rating or made an input error.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states they selected the wrong rating. Include: '1 should be 5', 'sorry I meant 5', 'change 1 to 5', 'meant to hit 5', 'oops I meant 5', 'typo I meant 5', 'correction: 5', 'my apologies 5', 'sorry wrong answer', 'I hit wrong number', 'should have been 5', 'pushed wrong number'. Use to identify systematic mis-scoring patterns.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Customer clarifies they selected the wrong rating or made an input error.
Sub_Topic: Error Correction — Affirming Satisfaction (Was Very Dissatisfied)
Sub_Topic_Definition: Specific to VOC design: customer rated 1 (Very Dissatisfied) but verbatim clarifies they meant Very Satisfied. Include: 'I meant 5', '1 is yes', 'correction: very satisfied', 'I am satisfied 1 means yes'. Isolate separately from general score corrections for mis-score analysis.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests to stop receiving survey communications.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer asks to stop receiving surveys. Include: 'stop', 'stop texting me', 'don't call me', 'leave me alone', 'stop asking me', 'stop these messages', 'stop texting me plz', 'just leave me alone', 'now leave me alone'. Compliance/CX signal for survey frequency.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Customer indicates the survey was sent to the wrong person or they have no knowledge of the interaction.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates they did not have the interaction or do not know the rep named. Include: 'who is [name]?', 'I wasn't there', 'IDK who that is', 'don't know her', 'it wasn't Maria', 'is this the right person'. Exclude customer confusion about the survey itself.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Verbatim is random characters completely off-topic or incomprehensible.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Verbatim is random characters, symbols, or completely off-topic content. Include: '!!!!!!!!!!!!!', '?????', random symbols, 'love the food', 'is she married', 'do you know Ligma'. Exclude Spanish/foreign language (classify separately after translation).

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine actionable customer feedback — they indicate a survey process issue missing data or non-substantive response.
Topic_Definition: Verbatim is in a non-English language that cannot be classified without translation.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Verbatim is predominantly in a non-English language where full meaning cannot be determined without translation. NOTE: Many Spanish verbatims CAN be classified directly (e.g., 'Muy satisfecho' = Overall Rep Satisfaction Positive; 'Todo excelente' = Overall Rep Positive; 'Muy caro' = Bill Too High). ONLY use this sub-topic when translation is truly required to classify. Flag for translation workflow.
